case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. WILLIAM F. BRADLEY et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUNAT TO CCP 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRADLEY, WILLIAM F. $4,042.53 PRINCIPAL, $797.82 INTEREST, $236.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,076.35, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $236.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $99.76 AS TO DEFENDANT BRADLEY, WILLIAM F.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. SERVED FEB-04-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BRADLEY, WILLIAM F.
